Summary:
Animates a control's position and/or opacity using configurable easing
functions. Animations can start automatically when the target control is
first shown or manually by calling PlayAnimation().

Properties.Name: TargetControl
Properties.Description: The control to animate. Forms are not supported; use cuiFormAnimator instead.

Properties.Name: TargetLocation
Properties.Description: The destination location when AnimateLocation is enabled.

Properties.Name: AnimateLocation
Properties.Description: Determines whether the control moves to TargetLocation during the animation.

Properties.Name: AnimateOpacity
Properties.Description: Animates the control between fully visible and fully transparent by drawing an overlay during painting.

Properties.Name: TargetOpacity
Properties.Description: Specifies whether the animation should end with the control visible or transparent.

Properties.Name: Duration
Properties.Description: Length of the animation in milliseconds.

Properties.Name: EasingType
Properties.Description: Selects the easing function used for the animation.

Properties.Name: AnimateOnStart
Properties.Description: Automatically starts the animation when the target control is first created.

Properties.Name: IsAnimating
Properties.Description: Indicates whether an animation is currently running.

Methods.Name: PlayAnimation()
Methods.Description: Starts the animation. If another animation is already running, the call is ignored.

Methods.Name: CancelAnimation()
Methods.Description: Immediately cancels the current animation, leaving the control at its current state.

Events.Name: AnimationStarted
Events.Description: Raised when an animation begins.

Events.Name: AnimationEnded
Events.Description: Raised after an animation completes normally.

Summary:
Applies a blur effect to an existing control by intercepting its paint
operation. The blurred image is cached and automatically regenerated whenever
the control's contents change.

Properties.Name: TargetControl
Properties.Description: The control that should be blurred. Forms are not supported.

Properties.Name: BlurAmount
Properties.Description: Controls the strength of the blur. Larger values produce a stronger blur effect.

Summary:
Allows a form to be moved by dragging a control instead of the form's title
bar. This is primarily intended for borderless windows with custom title bars.

Properties.Name: TargetControl
Properties.Description: The control that acts as the drag surface. Dragging this control with the left mouse button moves its parent form.

Summary:
Animates a form's Opacity property using configurable easing
functions. The animation can play automatically when the form is first shown
or be started manually.

Properties.Name: TargetForm
Properties.Description: The form whose opacity will be animated.

Properties.Name: AnimateOnStart
Properties.Description: Automatically plays the animation the first time the target form is shown.

Properties.Name: StartOpacity
Properties.Description: The opacity value at the beginning of the animation. Values are automatically clamped between 0 and 1.

Properties.Name: TargetOpacity
Properties.Description: The opacity value when the animation finishes. Values are automatically clamped between 0 and 1.

Properties.Name: Duration
Properties.Description: Length of the animation in milliseconds.

Properties.Name: EasingType
Properties.Description: Selects the easing function used during the opacity transition.

Methods.Name: PlayAnimation()
Methods.Description: Starts the opacity animation manually.

Summary:
Allows the user to move a form by dragging anywhere on its surface. This
component is primarily intended for borderless windows.

Properties.Name: TargetForm
Properties.Description: The form that should respond to drag operations.

Summary:
Prevents a form from appearing in screenshots and screen recordings by
applying a Windows display affinity setting. The exclusion mode can be
configured to either hide the window completely or replace it with a black
rectangle.

Properties.Name: TargetForm
Properties.Description: The form to which the capture exclusion should be applied.

Properties.Name: ExclusionType
Properties.Description:
Determines how the form appears in screenshots and screen recordings:
- Disappear - The window is omitted from the captured image.
- Black - The window is replaced with a black rectangle.
- None - Disables capture protection.

Methods.Name: RefreshExclusionType()
Methods.Description: Reapplies the current ExclusionType to the target form.

Summary:
Adds rounded corners to borderless forms by creating and managing a companion
window that renders the rounded outline. This component is intended for
Windows versions that do not provide native rounded window corners.

Properties.Name: TargetForm
Properties.Description: The form that should receive rounded corners. Only one cuiFormRounder can be assigned to a form at a time.

Properties.Name: Rounding
Properties.Description: Specifies the radius of the form's rounded corners. Setting this property updates the form immediately.

Properties.Name: OutlineColor
Properties.Description: Specifies the color of the outline drawn around the rounded form.

Methods.Name: UpdateRoundedFormRegion()
Methods.Description: Rebuilds the companion window's region to match the current size and shape of the target form.

Summary:
Displays a modern customizable message dialog while preventing interaction
with the parent form until the user selects an option. The dialog supports
common MessageBoxButtons layouts and returns a standard
DialogResult.

Properties.Name: DimColor
Properties.Description: The color and opacity of the overlay applied behind the dialog while it is open.

Properties.Name: DialogSize
Properties.Description: The default size of the dialog window. The height can automatically increase when the displayed text requires additional space.

Properties.Name: DialogPadding
Properties.Description: The padding applied between the dialog content and its edges.

Properties.Name: ButtonSize
Properties.Description: Controls the size of the buttons displayed inside the dialog.

Properties.Name: Rounding
Properties.Description: Controls the corner radius of the dialog window.

Properties.Name: BackColor
Properties.Description: The dialog background color.

Properties.Name: ForeColor
Properties.Description: The dialog text color.

Properties.Name: OKText
Properties.Description: The text displayed on the OK button.

Properties.Name: YesText
Properties.Description: The text displayed on the Yes button.

Properties.Name: NoText
Properties.Description: The text displayed on the No button.

Properties.Name: CancelText
Properties.Description: The text displayed on the Cancel button.

Methods.Name: ShowDialog(Form parentForm, string description, string title = "")
Methods.Description: Displays a dialog containing the specified message using an OK button.

Methods.Name: ShowDialog(Form parentForm, string description, string title, MessageBoxButtons messageBoxButtons)
Methods.Description: Displays a dialog using the specified button layout and returns the user's selection.

Summary:
Provides access to the modern Windows folder selection dialog as an
alternative to the legacy FolderBrowserDialog. Supports custom
labels and selecting one or multiple folders.

Properties.Name: Title
Properties.Description: Sets the dialog title. Leave empty to use the default system text.

Properties.Name: OkButtonLabel
Properties.Description: Changes the text displayed on the confirmation button. Leave empty to use the default system text.

Properties.Name: Multiselect
Properties.Description: Allows the user to select multiple folders instead of a single folder.

Properties.Name: FolderName
Properties.Description: Contains the first selected folder path after a successful selection.

Properties.Name: FolderNames
Properties.Description: Contains all selected folder paths after a successful selection when Multiselect is enabled.

Methods.Name: ShowDialog()
Methods.Description: Opens the folder selection dialog and returns the user's selection result.

Summary:
Displays an overlay badge on the application's taskbar icon. The badge can
either be a custom Image or an automatically generated numeric
notification indicator.

Properties.Name: TargetForm
Properties.Description: The form whose taskbar icon will display the badge.

Properties.Name: Image
Properties.Description:
Sets a custom overlay icon. Images are automatically resized to
16×16 if necessary.

Properties.Name: Description
Properties.Description: The accessibility description associated with the overlay icon.

Properties.Name: NumericValue
Properties.Description:
Displays a numeric badge instead of the custom image when greater
than 0. Values above 9 are displayed as
9+.

Properties.Name: NumericBackColor
Properties.Description: Background color of the generated numeric badge.

Properties.Name: NumericForeColor
Properties.Description: Text color of the generated numeric badge.

Properties.Name: NumericFont
Properties.Description: Font used when drawing the numeric badge.

Summary:
Controls the appearance of the application's taskbar button by displaying a
progress indicator or changing its state to indicate paused or failed
operations.

Properties.Name: TargetForm
Properties.Description: The form whose taskbar button will be updated.

Properties.Name: State
Properties.Description:
Selects the taskbar progress state. Available values are
Progress, Paused,
Error, and Default.

Properties.Name: ProgressValue
Properties.Description:
The current progress value displayed when the
State is not Default.

Properties.Name: MaxValue
Properties.Description:
Specifies the maximum progress value used to calculate the taskbar
progress percentage.

Methods.Name: Flash()
Methods.Description:
Continuously flashes the application's taskbar button until the
window receives focus, helping draw the user's attention.

Summary:
Displays a customizable tooltip when the mouse pointer hovers over a target
control. The tooltip follows the cursor until it leaves the control.

Properties.Name: TargetControl
Properties.Description: The control that displays the tooltip when hovered.

Properties.Name: Content
Properties.Description: The text displayed inside the tooltip.

Properties.Name: TooltipPosition
Properties.Description:
Determines where the tooltip is positioned relative to the mouse
cursor. Available values are Top,
Bottom, Left, Right, and
Custom.

Properties.Name: TooltipPositionOffset
Properties.Description:
Applies an additional position offset. This is primarily useful
when TooltipPosition is set to
Custom.

Properties.Name: ForeColor
Properties.Description: Sets the tooltip text color.

Properties.Name: BackColor
Properties.Description: Sets the tooltip background color.

Summary:
A customizable button supporting rounded corners, images, toggle behavior,
and independent appearance settings for its normal, hovered, pressed, and
checked states.

Properties.Name: Content
Properties.Description:
The text displayed by the button. This property is also exposed
through Text.

Properties.Name: DialogResult
Properties.Description:
Sets the parent form's DialogResult automatically
when the button is clicked.

Properties.Name: CheckButton
Properties.Description:
Enables toggle button behavior using the
Checked property.

Properties.Name: Checked
Properties.Description:
Gets or sets whether the button is currently checked. Changing
this property raises the CheckedChanged event.

Properties.Name: Image
Properties.Description: Displays an image next to the button text.

Properties.Name: ImageExpand
Properties.Description:
Adjusts the size of the displayed image. By default, the image is
rendered using the current font height.

Properties.Name: TextAlignment
Properties.Description:
Aligns the button content to the left, center, or right using
Near, Center, or
Far.

Properties.Name: TextSpacing
Properties.Description: Controls the spacing between the image and text.

Properties.Name: TextPadding
Properties.Description:
Adds padding around the button content. This property is most
useful when TextAlignment is
Near or Far.

Properties.Name: Rounding
Properties.Description: Controls the corner radius of the button.

Properties.Name: OutlineThickness
Properties.Description: Specifies the thickness of the button outline.

Events.Name: CheckedChanged
Events.Description: Occurs whenever the Checked property changes.

Summary:
A customizable radio button that automatically unchecks other
cuiButtonGroup controls belonging to the same group within the
same parent container.

Properties.Name: Content
Properties.Description:
The text displayed by the button. This property is also exposed
through Text.

Properties.Name: Group
Properties.Description:
Determines which cuiButtonGroup controls behave as a
single radio button group. Only controls with the same
Group value affect each other.

Properties.Name: Checked
Properties.Description:
Gets or sets whether this button is currently selected. Changing
this property raises the CheckedChanged event.

Properties.Name: Image
Properties.Description: Displays an image next to the button text.

Properties.Name: ImageExpand
Properties.Description:
Adjusts the size of the displayed image. By default, the image is
rendered using the current font height.

Properties.Name: TextAlignment
Properties.Description:
Aligns the button content to the left, center, or right using
Near, Center, or
Far.

Properties.Name: TextSpacing
Properties.Description: Controls the spacing between the image and text.

Properties.Name: TextPadding
Properties.Description:
Adds padding around the button content. This property is most
useful when TextAlignment is
Near or Far.

Properties.Name: Rounding
Properties.Description: Controls the corner radius of the button.

Properties.Name: OutlineThickness
Properties.Description: Specifies the thickness of the button outline.

Methods.Name: PerformClick()
Methods.Description:
Programmatically selects the button, updates the rest of its
group, and raises the Click event.

Events.Name: CheckedChanged
Events.Description: Occurs whenever the Checked property changes.

Summary:
A button-like control that displays the currently selected date. Clicking
the control opens the HartUI date picker dialog, allowing the user to select
a new date.

Properties.Name: Content
Properties.Description:
Gets or sets the selected date. The time portion is discarded,
leaving only the date.

Properties.Name: Theme
Properties.Description:
Specifies whether the date picker dialog opens using the
Light or Dark theme.

Properties.Name: EnableThemeChangeButton
Properties.Description:
Determines whether the dialog displays a button that allows the
user to switch between light and dark themes.

Properties.Name: PickerPosition
Properties.Description:
Controls where the date picker dialog appears relative to the
control.

Properties.Name: ShowIcon
Properties.Description:
Determines whether the calendar icon is displayed next to the
selected date.

Properties.Name: Icon
Properties.Description: Sets the image displayed beside the selected date.

Properties.Name: IconTint
Properties.Description: Tints the displayed calendar icon.

Properties.Name: Rounding
Properties.Description: Controls the corner radius of the control.

Methods.Name: ShowDialog()
Methods.Description: Opens the date picker dialog programmatically.

Events.Name: DateChanged
Events.Description: Occurs whenever the selected date changes.

Summary:
Displays a customizable single-line chart with optional Bézier curve
smoothing, gradient fill, and point value tooltips.

Properties.Name: DataPoints
Properties.Description:
The values displayed on the chart. At least two data points are
recommended for proper rendering.

Properties.Name: CustomXAxis
Properties.Description:
Replaces the default weekday labels with custom X-axis labels.
Leave empty to use the built-in weekday labels.

Properties.Name: AutoMaxValue
Properties.Description:
Automatically sets MaxValue to the largest value in
DataPoints. Enabled by default.

Properties.Name: MaxValue
Properties.Description:
Sets the maximum value displayed on the Y-axis. Assigning this
property automatically disables AutoMaxValue.

Properties.Name: UsePercent
Properties.Description:
Controls whether Y-axis labels and point tooltips display values
as percentages or absolute numbers.

Properties.Name: ShortDates
Properties.Description:
Uses abbreviated weekday names (Mon,
Tue, ...) instead of full names when the default
X-axis labels are used.

Properties.Name: UseBezier
Properties.Description: Draws smooth Bézier curves instead of straight line segments.

Properties.Name: GradientBackground
Properties.Description:
Draws a gradient fill beneath the chart line. When disabled, a
solid translucent fill is used instead.

Properties.Name: ShowLines
Properties.Description: Controls whether horizontal guide lines are displayed.

Properties.Name: ChartPadding
Properties.Description: Specifies the padding around the chart drawing area.

Summary:
A customizable checkbox control with rounded corners, configurable colors,
and optional checkmark and cross symbols.

Properties.Name: Checked
Properties.Description: Gets or sets whether the checkbox is checked.

Properties.Name: Content
Properties.Description:
The text displayed next to the checkbox.
Text is provided as an alias for this property.

Properties.Name: ShowSymbols
Properties.Description:
Determines whether the checkbox displays a checkmark when checked
and a cross when unchecked.

Properties.Name: Rounding
Properties.Description: Controls the corner radius of the checkbox.

Properties.Name: OutlineThickness
Properties.Description: Controls the thickness of the checkbox outline.

Events.Name: CheckedChanged
Events.Description: Occurs whenever the Checked property changes.

Summary:
An HSV color picker consisting of an outer hue ring and an inner
saturation/value triangle.

Properties.Name: Content
Properties.Description: Gets or sets the currently selected color.

Properties.Name: WheelThickness
Properties.Description:
Controls the thickness of the hue ring. Increasing this value
reduces the size of the saturation/value triangle.

Events.Name: ContentChanged
Events.Description:
Occurs whenever the selected color changes, either by user
interaction or by assigning Content from code.

Events.Name: SelectedColor
Events.Description:
Occurs after the user finishes selecting a color by releasing
the left mouse button.

Summary:
A modern combo box that displays its items in a separate rounded popup with
a custom scrollbar when necessary.

Properties.Name: Items
Properties.Description: The collection of items displayed in the drop-down list.

Properties.Name: SelectedIndex
Properties.Description:
Gets or sets the index of the currently selected item.
A value of -1 indicates that no item is selected.

Properties.Name: SelectedItem
Properties.Description:
Gets or sets the currently selected item by its text.
Assigning an empty string clears the selection.

Properties.Name: NoSelectionText
Properties.Description:
The placeholder text displayed when
SelectedIndex is -1.

Properties.Name: SortAlphabetically
Properties.Description:
Automatically sorts the items alphabetically before opening the
drop-down.

Properties.Name: MaxDropDownHeight
Properties.Description:
Specifies the maximum height of the drop-down before scrolling is
enabled.

Methods.Name: AddItem(string)
Methods.Description: Adds a new item to the combo box.

Methods.Name: RemoveItem(string)
Methods.Description: Removes the first matching item from the combo box.

Events.Name: SelectedIndexChanged
Events.Description: Occurs whenever the selected item changes.

Summary: Displays a simple ellipse with customizable fill color and optional outline.

Properties.Name: PanelColor
Properties.Description: Specifies the fill color of the ellipse.

Properties.Name: OutlineColor
Properties.Description: Specifies the color of the ellipse outline.

Properties.Name: OutlineThickness
Properties.Description: Controls the thickness of the outline in pixels.

Summary:
Accepts files by drag and drop or, optionally, by opening an
OpenFileDialog when clicked.

Properties.Name: UploadWithClick
Properties.Description:
Determines whether clicking the control opens an
OpenFileDialog.

Properties.Name: Multiselect
Properties.Description: Allows the user to select or drop multiple files at once.

Properties.Name: Filter
Properties.Description:
Specifies the allowed file types. The same filter is applied to
both drag-and-drop and the file dialog.

Properties.Name: FileName
Properties.Description: Gets the first selected or dropped file.

Properties.Name: FileNames
Properties.Description: Gets all selected or dropped files.

Methods.Name: GetExtensionsFromFilter()
Methods.Description:
Returns the list of file extensions parsed from the
Filter property.

Events.Name: FileDropped
Events.Description:
Occurs after one or more valid files have been selected or
dropped onto the control.

Summary:
Accepts folders by drag and drop or, optionally, by opening a modern
OpenFolderDialog when clicked.

Properties.Name: UploadWithClick
Properties.Description:
Determines whether clicking the control opens an
OpenFolderDialog.

Properties.Name: Multiselect
Properties.Description: Allows the user to select or drop multiple folders at once.

Properties.Name: FolderName
Properties.Description: Gets the first selected or dropped folder.

Properties.Name: FolderNames
Properties.Description: Gets all selected or dropped folders.

Events.Name: FolderDropped
Events.Description:
Occurs after one or more valid folders have been selected or
dropped onto the control.

Summary:
A lightweight container with a rounded border and an optional title displayed
in its top-left corner.

Properties.Name: Content
Properties.Description: Sets the title displayed at the top of the group box.

Properties.Name: Text
Properties.Description: An alias for Content, provided for compatibility with standard WinForms controls.

Properties.Name: Rounding
Properties.Description: Controls the corner radius of the border.

Summary:
Displays a customizable hexagon with configurable corner rounding, fill
color, and optional outline.

Properties.Name: PanelColor
Properties.Description: Specifies the fill color of the hexagon.

Properties.Name: OutlineColor
Properties.Description: Specifies the color of the hexagon outline.

Properties.Name: OutlineThickness
Properties.Description: Controls the thickness of the outline in pixels.

Properties.Name: Rounding
Properties.Description:
Controls how rounded the six corners of the hexagon appear.
Higher values produce smoother corners.

Summary: An enhanced label control with flexible text layout and rendering options.

Properties.Name: Content
Properties.Description: The text displayed by the control.

Properties.Name: HorizontalAlignment
Properties.Description: Controls the horizontal alignment of the text.

Properties.Name: VerticalAlignment
Properties.Description: Controls the vertical alignment of the text.

Properties.Name: WordWrap
Properties.Description:
Enables wrapping text onto multiple lines. When disabled, the text is
rendered on a single line.

Properties.Name: AutoEllipsis
Properties.Description:
Displays an ellipsis (...) when the text does not fit
within the control and AutoSize is disabled.

Properties.Name: AutoSize
Properties.Description:
Automatically resizes the control to fit its content, taking the
current font, padding, and WordWrap setting into account.

Properties.Name: Trimming
Properties.Description:
Specifies how clipped text is trimmed when
AutoEllipsis is disabled.

Summary:
A list box with rounded corners, customizable item
appearance, and hover highlighting.

Properties.Name: Rounding
Properties.Description: Controls the rounding of the list box itself.

Properties.Name: ItemRounding
Properties.Description: Controls the rounding applied to individual items.

Properties.Name: HoveredIndex
Properties.Description: Gets the index of the item currently under the mouse pointer, or -1 if none.

Summary:
A one-time password input control that displays each character in its own
box and automatically tracks when all boxes have been filled.

Properties.Name: BoxAmount
Properties.Description: Determines the number of character boxes displayed.

Properties.Name: Content
Properties.Description:
Gets or sets the entered text. Text is an alias for
this property.

Properties.Name: OnlyDigit
Properties.Description: Intended to restrict input to digits only.

Properties.Name: UnderlinedStyle
Properties.Description:
Draws only the bottom border of each box instead of a full
outline.

Methods.Name: ResetText()
Methods.Description: Clears the current input.

Events.Name: FinishedTypingContent
Events.Description:
Occurs when the number of entered characters reaches
BoxAmount.

Events.Name: NotFinishedTypingContent
Events.Description:
Occurs when the content becomes shorter than
BoxAmount, such as after deleting a character.

Summary: A panel with customizable rounded corners, background, and border.

Properties.Name: Rounding
Properties.Description:
Controls the corner radius of the panel. Each corner can be
rounded independently.

Summary:
A panel with independently customizable gradient background and border,
including configurable gradient direction and rounded corners.

Properties.Name: GradientAngle
Properties.Description: Controls the direction of both the background and border gradients.

Properties.Name: OutlineThickness
Properties.Description: Sets the thickness of the gradient border.

Properties.Name: Rounding
Properties.Description: Controls the corner radius of the panel.

Summary:
Displays an image with optional tinting, rotation, rounded corners, and an
optional outline.

Properties.Name: Content
Properties.Description: The image displayed by the control.

Properties.Name: ImageTint
Properties.Description: Applies a color tint to the displayed image.

Properties.Name: Rotation
Properties.Description: Rotates the image in degrees.

Properties.Name: Rounding
Properties.Description: Controls the corner radius of the control.

Summary:
Displays progress as a circular indicator with configurable thickness and
optional rounded ends.

Properties.Name: ProgressValue
Properties.Description: Specifies the current progress value.

Properties.Name: MinimumValue
Properties.Description: Specifies the minimum progress value.

Properties.Name: MaximumValue
Properties.Description: Specifies the maximum progress value.

Properties.Name: BorderWidth
Properties.Description: Controls the thickness of the circular progress bar.

Properties.Name: RoundedEnds
Properties.Description: Determines whether the progress arc uses rounded line caps.

Summary:
Displays progress as a horizontal bar with configurable direction and
rounded corners.

Properties.Name: Value
Properties.Description: Gets or sets the current progress value.

Properties.Name: MaxValue
Properties.Description: Specifies the maximum progress value.

Properties.Name: Flipped
Properties.Description:
Reverses the fill direction so the progress bar fills from right
to left.

Properties.Name: Rounding
Properties.Description:
Controls the corner radius. The value is automatically limited
to half of the control's height.

Summary:
Displays progress as a vertical bar with configurable direction and
rounded corners.

Properties.Name: Value
Properties.Description: Gets or sets the current progress value.

Properties.Name: MaxValue
Properties.Description: Specifies the maximum progress value.

Properties.Name: Flipped
Properties.Description:
Reverses the fill direction so the progress bar fills from top
to bottom instead of bottom to top.

Properties.Name: Rounding
Properties.Description:
Controls the corner radius. The value is automatically limited
to half of the control's height.

Summary:
Displays progress through a sequence of tasks using connected indicators.
Completed, current, and remaining tasks are shown with different visual
states.

Properties.Name: Tasks
Properties.Description: The list of task names displayed by the control.

Properties.Name: TasksProgress
Properties.Description: Specifies how many tasks have been completed.

Properties.Name: CurrentTask
Properties.Description: Read-only. Returns the name of the current task.

Properties.Name: ShowSymbols
Properties.Description: Determines whether completed tasks display a checkmark.

Properties.Name: AutoRounding
Properties.Description:
Automatically rounds each task indicator into a circle.
Disable this to use the Rounding property.

Summary:
Displays progress through a sequence of tasks using a vertical step tracker.
Completed tasks, the current task, and remaining tasks are visually distinguished.

Properties.Name: Tasks
Properties.Description: Specifies the list of task names displayed by the control.

Properties.Name: TasksProgress
Properties.Description: Determines how many tasks have been completed.

Properties.Name: CurrentTask
Properties.Description: Read-only. Returns the name of the current task.

Properties.Name: ShowSymbols
Properties.Description: Determines whether completed tasks display a checkmark.

Properties.Name: LineThickness
Properties.Description: Controls the thickness of the connecting lines.

Properties.Name: AutoRounding
Properties.Description: Automatically rounds task indicators into circles. Disable this to use the Rounding property.

Properties.Name: Rounding
Properties.Description: Controls the corner radius of the task indicators when AutoRounding is disabled.

Summary:
Restores bottom-right resizing for borderless forms by providing a draggable
resize grip.

Properties.Name: TargetForm
Properties.Description:
The borderless form that will be resized when the grip is
dragged.

Properties.Name: GripTexture
Properties.Description: Determines whether the resize grip texture is drawn.

Properties.Name: GripSize
Properties.Description: Controls the size of each square in the grip texture.

Properties.Name: SkipBottomRightSquare
Properties.Description: Omits the bottom-right square from the grip texture.

Summary:
A simple divider for visually separating content. It can be displayed
horizontally or vertically.

Properties.Name: Vertical
Properties.Description:
Determines whether the separator is drawn vertically instead of
horizontally.

Properties.Name: SeparatorMargin
Properties.Description: Sets the empty space at both ends of the separator line.

Properties.Name: Thickness
Properties.Description: Controls the thickness of the separator line.

Summary:
A customizable horizontal slider for selecting a value within a specified
range.

Properties.Name: Value
Properties.Description:
Gets or sets the slider's current value. Changing it raises the
ValueChanged event.

Properties.Name: MinValue
Properties.Description: Specifies the minimum selectable value.

Properties.Name: MaxValue
Properties.Description: Specifies the maximum selectable value.

Properties.Name: ThumbOutlineThickness
Properties.Description: Controls the thickness of the thumb's outline.

Methods.Name: GetProgressPercentage()
Methods.Description:
Returns the current slider position as a value between
0 and 1.

Events.Name: ValueChanged
Events.Description: Occurs whenever the Value changes.

Summary:
A customizable vertical slider for selecting a value within a specified
range by dragging the thumb.

Properties.Name: Value
Properties.Description: Gets or sets the current slider value.

Properties.Name: MinValue
Properties.Description: Specifies the minimum value the slider can represent.

Properties.Name: MaxValue
Properties.Description: Specifies the maximum value the slider can represent.

Properties.Name: UpsideDown
Properties.Description: Reverses the slider direction so higher values appear at the top instead of the bottom.

Properties.Name: ThumbOutlineThickness
Properties.Description: Controls the thickness of the outline drawn around the slider thumb.

Methods.Name: GetProgressPercentage()
Methods.Description: Returns the current slider position as a value between 0 and 1.

Events.Name: ValueChanged
Events.Description: Occurs whenever the Value property changes.

Summary:
Displays an animated loading spinner consisting of a background ring and a
rotating arc.

Properties.Name: RotateEnabled
Properties.Description: Starts or stops the spinner animation.

Properties.Name: RotateSpeed
Properties.Description: Controls how quickly the spinner rotates.

Properties.Name: Rotation
Properties.Description:
Gets or sets the current rotation angle. This can be used to
manually control the spinner when RotateEnabled is
disabled.

Properties.Name: Thickness
Properties.Description:
Controls the thickness of both the background ring and the
rotating arc.

Summary:
Displays a row of stars for selecting or displaying a rating. Supports
half-star increments and can optionally be made read-only.

Properties.Name: StarCount
Properties.Description: Controls how many stars are displayed.

Properties.Name: Rating
Properties.Description:
Gets or sets the current rating. The maximum value is
StarCount × 2, allowing half-star increments.

Properties.Name: Rounding
Properties.Description: Controls how rounded the star points are. Higher values make the stars more rounded, while lower values less rounded. Rounding = 0 makes the corners sharp.

Properties.Name: AllowUserInteraction
Properties.Description: Determines whether the user can change the rating with the mouse.

Events.Name: RatingChanged
Events.Description: Occurs whenever the Rating property changes.

Summary:
An animated toggle switch that provides a modern alternative to a traditional
checkbox.

Properties.Name: Checked
Properties.Description: Gets or sets whether the switch is in the checked state.

Properties.Name: OutlineThickness
Properties.Description: Controls the thickness of the switch's outline.

Properties.Name: ThumbSizeModifier
Properties.Description: Adjusts the size of the thumb without changing the overall control size.

Events.Name: CheckedChanged
Events.Description: Occurs whenever the Checked property changes.

Summary:
A custom tab control whose pages are created programmatically instead of
through the designer. Each tab hosts a Control, such as a
UserControl, and can optionally display an image.

Properties.Name: SelectedIndex
Properties.Description: Gets or changes the currently selected tab by index.

Properties.Name: SelectedTab
Properties.Description: Gets or changes the currently selected TabPage.

Properties.Name: Pages
Properties.Description: Provides a read-only collection of all tabs.

Properties.Name: Count
Properties.Description: Gets the number of tabs currently in the control.

Properties.Name: ShowPlus
Properties.Description: Determines whether the built-in add tab button is displayed.

Properties.Name: ShowDelete
Properties.Description: Determines whether close buttons are shown on tab headers.

Properties.Name: NamingConvention
Properties.Description: Specifies the base name used when automatically creating new tabs.

Properties.Name: ScrollOffset
Properties.Description: Gets or sets the current horizontal scroll position of the tab strip.

Methods.Name: AddTab()
Methods.Description: Creates a new empty tab using the current NamingConvention.

Methods.Name: AddTab(string)
Methods.Description: Creates a new empty tab with the specified title.

Methods.Name: AddTab(string, Control)
Methods.Description: Creates a tab and automatically docks the supplied control to fill its contents.

Methods.Name: AddTab(string, Bitmap, Control)
Methods.Description: Creates a tab with an image and automatically docks the supplied control.

Methods.Name: SelectTab(int)
Methods.Description: Selects a tab by its index.

Methods.Name: SelectTab(TabPage)
Methods.Description: Selects the specified tab.

Methods.Name: RemoveTab(int)
Methods.Description: Removes the tab at the specified index.

Methods.Name: RemoveTab(TabPage)
Methods.Description: Removes the specified tab.

Methods.Name: RemoveSelectedTab()
Methods.Description: Removes the currently selected tab.

Methods.Name: ClearTabs()
Methods.Description: Removes every tab from the control.

Methods.Name: Contains(TabPage)
Methods.Description: Returns whether the specified tab belongs to this control.

Methods.Name: IndexOf(TabPage)
Methods.Description: Returns the index of the specified tab.

Methods.Name: GetUniqueTabName()
Methods.Description: Generates the next available tab name using NamingConvention.

Events.Name: TabAdded
Events.Description: Occurs after a new tab has been created.

Events.Name: TabRemoved
Events.Description: Occurs after a tab has been removed.

Events.Name: SelectedTabChanged
Events.Description: Occurs when the selected tab changes.

Summary:
A customizable text box supporting rounded corners, placeholder text,
optional images, multiline input, and focus-specific appearance.

Properties.Name: Content
Properties.Description: Gets or sets the current text. This property is equivalent to Text.

Properties.Name: PlaceholderText
Properties.Description: Text displayed when the control is empty and does not have focus.

Properties.Name: Multiline
Properties.Description: Determines whether the control accepts multiple lines of text.

Properties.Name: PasswordChar
Properties.Description: Displays password characters instead of the entered text.

Properties.Name: UnderlinedStyle
Properties.Description: Draws only the bottom border instead of a complete outline.

Properties.Name: Image
Properties.Description: Displays an optional image inside the text box. Its position, size, and tint can be customized.

Properties.Name: Rounding
Properties.Description: Controls the corner radius of the text box.

Methods.Name: ResetText()
Methods.Description: Clears the current text and restores the placeholder if applicable.

Events.Name: ContentChanged
Events.Description: Occurs whenever the text entered by the user changes.

Summary:
A specialized text box that automatically formats credit card numbers,
detects the card provider, and displays the corresponding card logo.

Properties.Name: Content
Properties.Description: Gets or sets the current credit card number. This property is equivalent to Text.

Properties.Name: PlaceholderText
Properties.Description: Text displayed when the control is empty and does not have focus.

Properties.Name: Company
Properties.Description: Gets the detected card provider.

Properties.Name: IsCardValid
Properties.Description: Indicates whether the entered number is long enough to identify a supported card provider.

Properties.Name: PasswordChar
Properties.Description: Displays password characters instead of the entered text.

Properties.Name: UnderlinedStyle
Properties.Description: Draws only the bottom border instead of a complete outline.

Properties.Name: Rounding
Properties.Description: Controls the corner radius of the text box.

Methods.Name: ResetText()
Methods.Description: Clears the current text and restores the placeholder if applicable.

Methods.Name: DetectCardType(string)
Methods.Description: Detects the card provider from the specified card number.

Events.Name: ContentChanged
Events.Description: Occurs whenever the entered card number changes.

Events.Name: IsCardValidChanged
Events.Description: Occurs when the value of IsCardValid changes.

Summary:
Welcome to the HartUI documentation.

HartUI is a fork of the original
CuoreUI library.
This project continues its development,
fixes bugs, adds new controls and components, and keeps the library up to
date.

A modern replacement for FolderBrowserDialog that uses the
Windows File Open dialog in folder selection mode. It supports modern UI,
multi-selection, and several customization options.

Properties.Name: Multiselect
Properties.Description: Allows the user to select multiple folders.

Properties.Name: FolderName
Properties.Description: Gets the first selected folder.

Properties.Name: FolderNames
Properties.Description: Gets all selected folders.

Properties.Name: InputPath
Properties.Description: Specifies the initial folder displayed when the dialog opens.

Properties.Name: Title
Properties.Description: Sets the dialog window title.

Properties.Name: OkButtonLabel
Properties.Description: Changes the text displayed on the confirmation button.

Properties.Name: FileNameLabel
Properties.Description: Changes the label displayed next to the folder name field.

Methods.Name: ShowDialog()
Methods.Description: Displays the dialog using the application's main window as its owner.

Methods.Name: ShowDialog(IntPtr)
Methods.Description: Displays the dialog using the specified window handle as its owner.

Summary: Here's the list of controls and components, and their intended purposes!
